turns.q: Can I change the shipping address on an order I just placed?
turns.replyTail:
Bloom & Wild Chat
Willow

Hello Benchmark!

I'm Willow, Bloom & Wild's virtual assistant, how can I help you?

07:50
Can I change the shipping address on an order I just placed?
07:50
Willow

You can change the shipping address via your account if your order hasn't been processed yet. Log in to your account at My Account, select your order, and edit the address. If the order is locked, further changes may not be possible.

07:50

turns.q: Can I cancel an order after placing it, and is there a time window?
turns.replyTail:
count at My Account, select your order, and edit the address. If the order is locked, further changes may not be possible.

07:50
Can I cancel an order after placing it, and is there a time window?
07:50
Willow

You can cancel your order via My Account until we start preparing it. For next-day delivery, preparation begins immediately, so cancellations may not be possible. We recommend cancelling at least 48 hours before the delivery date, especially during busy periods.

07:51
⚡ by DigitalGenius

Can I add an item to an order I already placed?
07:51
Willow

Unfortunately, adding items to an existing order isn't possible. You can place a new order for the additional items or check My Account to make other edits if your order hasn't been processed yet.

lready placed?

07:51
What happens if it already shipped — can it still be changed?
07:51
Willow

Once an order has shipped, changes to delivery details or items are no longer possible. You can check My Account to see if edits are still available before shipping.
